candidates.notes: H_Mech factorial pilot passes all criteria. Encoder alignment drives absorption (effect=0.519), decoder geometry contributes negligibly (effect=0.008). Multi-seed validation confirms trained SAE absorption > 0.3 across all 5 seeds (mean=0.355 +/- 0.026), random baseline < 0.2 for all seeds (mean=0.033), t-test p=1.4e-08. H_Safe pilot shows no significant difference between safety-critical and non-safety feature absorption (p=0.326), suggesting absorption is a general geometric property. H3 steering pilot shows absorbed features are NOT more sensitive to parent-direction steering than non-absorbed features (ratio=0.97x, p=0.936), a robust negative result across three steering conditions.
